mdmDomains.title: Customer
governanceRules: Master customer records are governed by singleLocationScope
Customer identity must be validated before profile creation

mdmDomains.title: Staff member
governanceRules: Master staff records are governed by singleLocationScope
Active staff members must have a defined role to enforce RBAC

mdmDomains.title: Service
governanceRules: Master service records are governed by serviceDurationPriceRequired and singleLocationScope
Service catalog changes require manager approval

mdmDomains.title: Product
governanceRules: Master product records are governed by inventoryCannotGoNegative and singleLocationScope
Product catalog changes require manager approval

mdmDomains.title: Commission rule
governanceRules: Master commission rules are governed by commissionCalculationRequired and singleLocationScope
Commission rule changes require owner approval

questions: Confirm the commission rule type (fixed %, tiered, or per-stylist custom) to finalize calculation logic.
Should upsell recommendations use only visit history or also current inventory and service availability?
Do you want separate usecase entities for create vs update actions on Customer, StaffMember, and Service, or a combined upsert usecase?
Should the check-in action enforce any additional rules (e.g., appointment must be booked and not cancelled/noShow) before transitioning to checkedIn?
trace: Inferred master data domains from ontology and approved artifacts: Customer, StaffMember, Service, Product, and CommissionRule.
Excluded transactional entities (Appointment, Sale, InventoryLedger, AvailabilitySlot) from MDM scope.
Mapped sourceOfTruth to logical domain services and linked consumer artifacts (pages, workflows, agents, usecases, metricTables) per domain.
Applied governance rules derived from solution rules: singleLocationScope, serviceDurationPriceRequired, inventoryCannotGoNegative, and commissionCalculationRequired.
